message:
feat(wasm): Add WASI bindings + eval worker handlers

1. src/analysis/wasi_bindings.zig:
   - WASI function signatures with capability tracking
   - Standard wasi_snapshot_preview1 function definitions
   - Capability-based security manifest generation
   - High-level wrapper generation (fs.read, fs.write)

2. packages/wasm-runtime/index.js:
   - Added eval worker handlers for bytecode VM:
     - spawnEvalWorker: viral spawning with cached WASM module
     - isWorkerDone, getWorkerResult, waitWorkerResult
     - cancelWorker for cleanup
   - Cache compiled WASM module for worker reuse
   - Workers receive same module, avoiding recompilation

This completes the browser WASM integration for eval()/exec().
